comments.body: Dobromir.Kostov Please, review the attached file and approve.

nika kevlishvili Please, review this example on DEV env. We have a customer with 3 versions → http://10.236.20.11:8080/customers/preview/basic?id=6065223 and a contract with 2 versions → http://10.236.20.11:8080/energy-product-contracts/preview/basic-parameters?id=79368 , the first one is Valid/Signed by both sides and use customer version 1, the second is Cancelled and use customer version 2. Create a mass email for this contract with it’s version 1 → MASS_IMPORT_OF_CONTRACTS-import-template.xlsx The system creates an individual email → http://10.236.20.11:8080/email/preview?id=1537899&type=MASS_EMAIL with wrong communication (from version 3 of the customer). Create a mass sms for same contract without version → MASS_SMS_CONTRACT-import-template_sms.xlsx http://10.236.20.11:8080/sms/preview?id=33768 - the result is the same , the created individual sms takes commnunication from version 3 (latest) of the customer → http://10.236.20.11:8080/sms/preview?id=33768 . Example for penalty with execution date 20.04.2026 → http://10.236.20.11:8080/actions-for-terminations-and-penalties/preview?id=1566, the generated email takes the communication data from cancelled contract version → http://10.236.20.11:8080/email/preview?id=1133157&type=EMAIL
Kalina.Koleva hello , i will check it .
